channel.title: Chinese Journal of Catalysis
channel.description: Filtered papers from Chinese Journal of Catalysis

item.title: Biphasic Interface Engineering: A Machine Learning-Guided Strategy for Optimizing Selective Oxidative Desulfurization of FCC Slurry Oil
item.description:
Publication date: May 2026

Source: Chinese Journal of Catalysis, Volume 84

Author(s): Xiaoxiao Xing, Peiwen Wu, Yiru Zou, Zhaozeng Gao, Zhendong Yu, Minmeng Tang, Yanhong Chao, Wenshuai Zhu, Zhichang Liu, Chunming Xu
item.dc:source: ScienceDirect Publication: Chinese Journal of Catalysis
